title: Legs & Core
description: Leg strength with wall sit, paused lunges and single-leg deadlift, followed by core work

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Jump spreading arms and legs, return feet together

exercises.name: Hip 90/90
exercises.instructions: Seated, legs at 90 degrees, twist side to side

exercises.name: Inchworms
exercises.instructions: Standing, walk hands forward into a plank, then walk back

exercises.name: Paused lunges
exercises.instructions: Lower and hold 3s at the bottom before coming back up

exercises.name: Single-leg deadlift
exercises.instructions: Lean the torso forward, one leg lifts behind, keep balance

exercises.name: Wall sit
exercises.instructions: Back against the wall, thighs parallel, hold the position

exercises.name: Marching glute bridge
exercises.instructions: In glute bridge, alternate lifting one leg then the other like marching

exercises.name: Scissors
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, legs extended, cross alternating over/under

exercises.name: Forearm plank
exercises.instructions: On forearms, body perfectly aligned, brace the abs

exercises.name: V-ups
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, lift arms and legs to touch the feet

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
